title: salix × hayatana
intro: Salix × hayatana, also known as the Hayata willow, is a hybrid species of the willow plant, resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix matsudana. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × hayatana include its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the bark and leaves being commonly used in herbal preparations.
